title: hieracium villosum subsp. trichocraspedum
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. trichocraspedum, also known as woolly hawkweed, is a sub-species of the Hieracium villosum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. trichocraspedum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, which can also help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
